mechanics: DOCUMENTED: login MOTD 'Welcome to Realm of the Mad God' + tutorial lines ('Use [WASDQE] to move; click to shoot!', 'Type /help for more help') -> ROTF keeps RotMG's stock onboarding. POTION-TO-MAX counter: 'Potion of <Stat> consumed. <N> left to max.' (Speed/Attack/Defense seen — tracks pots remaining to max each stat). Global announcer uses random PERSONAS (this stream: Djinn) for event spawn/defeat. A 'Death Notifier' persona posts player deaths with a party-fame tuple: '<Death Notifier> Sayimfao (0/8: 0) has been killed'. Event bosses: The Mad Jester, Uvuvwevwevwe.
